params.name: Thundos' Head
params.description: This broken skull once belonged to Thundos, one of the eight Demon Gods. The notorious entity used to rule a Domain on his own. Even with thorough preparation, he nevertheless followed in Racky's footsteps and lost to a snail in a climactic showdown, with his own head taken a trophy.
